rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type annexes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation annexes for subcomponent bindings.
Ensure all AGREE identifiers and types are present in the AADL model's visible scope.
generic_rules: Use component type scopes for input assumptions and output guarantees that reference visible ports.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model.
Only include bounds or relations explicitly stated in the requirement.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assumptions and guarantees must reference visible AADL features or constants.
Constants and equations in AGREE should match the data types of their AADL counterparts.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not assume numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
